fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the contract/service discount.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the discount becomes applicable to the contract or quote.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique number of filed service contract or service contract quote.
